info.title: Mordee Doctor API
info.description: REST API for Mordee doctor application

200.description: Pending doctor approval detail or typed not-found

get.summary: Detailed health check with uptime and version information

200.description: Active approved doctor or typed not-found
List of notifications with cursor pagination

400.description: Invalid FCM token or request parameters

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: Device ID to delete FCM token for

200.description: Doctor's available timeslots for the date

ApiResponse.description: Top-level discriminated response for the appointment-detail endpoint.

AppointmentCardStatus.description:
Lightweight appointment card status for Firebase RTDB.
Matches Scala `AppointmentCardStatus` — serialises as `{"__type": "UpComing"}`.

AssociatePrivilege.description: Insurance privilege attached to a doctor profile (legacy contract).

BookingType.description:
Booking type with JSON compatibility

Uses __type tag for backward compatibility with existing JSON format

ChannelInfo.description: Channel info composed from doctor_consultation_config channel, fee, and duration.

ChannelType.description:
Consultation channel supported by a doctor. Maps to the Postgres
`channel_type_enum` type used by `doctor_consultation_config.channel_types`.

ConsultationChannel.description:
Consultation channel with JSON compatibility
Accepts "video", "VIDEO", "Video" etc. (case-insensitive) to handle Java service output.

ConsultationEvent.description:
Consultation event with JSON compatibility

Uses __type tag for backward compatibility with existing JSON format

ConsultationState.description: Detailed consultation state for state machine validation

ConsultationStateDoc.description: Consultation state document stored in Firestore

DoctorConfiguration.description: The doctor's consultation configuration returned by `GET doctor-configuration`.

duration.description:
Consultation duration in minutes (`doctor_consultation_config.duration_minutes`);
`null` until the doctor sets one.

DoctorListResponse.description: Top-level list response envelope (matches legacy contract).

DoctorTimeslotSchema.description:
A single doctor timeslot as returned to the client. This is both the wire
type and the OpenAPI schema, so the documentation can't drift from the data.
`slotDate`/`startTime`/`endTime` are ISO strings (`YYYY-MM-DD` / `HH:MM:SS`),
the civil date/time in the request's `time_zone`.

EkycResponse.description: Wire response (typed-variant convention; 200 OK for all variants).

Fee.description:
Consultation fee with its currency. `amount` is `null` until the doctor sets
a fee (`doctor_consultation_config.doctor_fee_amount` is nullable).

GetDoctorConfigurationResponse.description:
Response for `GET /profile/v1/doctor-configuration`.
Domain "not found" returns HTTP 200 with a `__type` discriminator,
matching the project's response convention (see `GetOnboardingResponse`).

oneOf.description: No draft exists yet - appointment is in pending record state

allOf.description: Existing summarization record (Draft or Submitted status)

oneOf.description: Existing summarization record (Draft or Submitted status)

HealthDetailedResponse.description: Detailed health check response with uptime and version

HealthReadinessResponse.description: Readiness probe response with dependency health status

HealthSimpleResponse.description: Simple health check response (backward compatible with existing /health endpoint)

LanguageCode.description:
Language supported by a doctor. Maps to the Postgres `language_code_enum`
type used by `doctor_consultation_config.supported_languages`.

sentAt.description:
Stored as Firestore native Timestamp by the Scala server; use Zoned to
round-trip correctly with both the Scala-written documents and new Rust writes.

pastVisit.description: Single past-visit object passed through from qolphin.

pastVisits.description: Passthrough array from qolphin (all past visits for the patient).

amount.description: THB total. Serialized as a JSON number.

PolicyType.description: Policy type nested inside an associate privilege (legacy contract).

SaveDraftRequest.description:
Request body for `POST /consultation/v1/summarization/draft`.

All fields are optional to support partial saves (drafts).

ScheduledNotificationDoc.description: Scheduled notification stored in Firestore for tracking and cancellation

SessionStateInfo.description: Information about the current session state

SubmitRequest.description:
Request body for `POST /consultation/v1/summarization/submit`.

All fields are required for submission (validated by serde deserialization).

oneOf.description: Summary was already submitted — informational, not an error.
Jade (prescription) service call failed — status stays Draft, doctor can retry.
Consultation service call failed — status stays Draft, doctor can retry.

SubmitSummaryNote.description: Summary note fields required at submit time — no optional strings.

oneOf.description:
`null` when (a) payment is null, (b) upstream couponProtocol is null,
or (c) upstream campaignName is missing or empty.
`null` when payment-svc returned `NotFound` (no successful payment yet).

status.description: FHIR appointment status, passed through from consultation.

UpdateConfigurationResponse.description:
Response for the PATCH endpoints. `Success` on update; `NotFound` (HTTP 200)
when no `doctor_profile` row matches the caller.
